# Dolphin Centrifuge - Site Guide for LLMs

> Dolphin Centrifuge is a U.S.-based industrial centrifuge company in Warren, Michigan.
> We remanufacture, design, and build Alfa Laval disc-stack and decanter centrifuge systems.
> 40+ years of hands-on centrifuge engineering experience.

## Company

- Name: Dolphin Centrifuge
- Location: Warren, Michigan, USA
- Phone: (248) 522-2573
- Website: https://dolphincentrifuge.com
- Contact: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/contact-for-alfa-laval-centrifuges/

## Products

- Disc Stack Centrifuges: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/disc-stack-centrifuge/
- Decanter Centrifuges: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/decanter-centrifuge/
- Stainless Steel Centrifuges: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/stainless-steel-centrifuge/
- Alfa Laval Centrifuges Gallery: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/alfa-laval-centrifuges/
- Centrifuge Parts: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/alfa-laval-centrifuge-parts/
- Explosion Proof Centrifuges: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/explosion-proof-centrifuge/

## Applications

- Diesel Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/diesel-centrifuge/
- Waste Oil Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/waste-oil-centrifuge/
- Lube Oil Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/lube-oil-centrifuge/
- Machine Coolant Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/machine-coolant-centrifuge/
- Hydraulic Oil Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/hydraulic-oil-centrifuge/
- Beer & Wine Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/beer-wine-centrifuge/
- Food Grade Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/food-grade-centrifuge/
- Wastewater Centrifuge: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/wastewater-centrifuge/
- All Applications: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/disc-stack-centrifuge-applications/

## Services

- Centrifuge Repair: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/industrial-disc-centrifuge-repair/
- Centrifuge Training: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/industrial-centrifuge-training/
- Sample Testing: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/industrial-centrifuge-sample-testing/
- Centrifuge Buyback: https://dolphincentrifuge.com/industrial-centrifuge-buyback/
